jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
